questions.title: Upper page region — text and structure

criteria.description: OCR extracts readable text from the upper portion of the page
Identifies structural elements (headers, titles, or tables) if present

questions.title: Lower page region — figures and footnotes

criteria.description: Handles lower-page content (text blocks, captions, or diagrams)
Partial credit for detecting tables, pictures, or footnotes
Clear justification tied to rubric criteria
